entities.name: ICRISAT GENEBANK
entities.description: The facility where global sorghum germplasm collections are stored

entities.name: GERMPLASM COLLECTIONS
entities.description: The total set of genetic resources for sorghum, exceeding 37,000 accessions

entities.name: CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A representative subset of 2247 accessions developed in 2001 to provide researchers access to a smaller set of germplasm

entities.name: MINI CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A further reduced subset of the core collection
